name: FileUpload
description: FileFormatIcon (colored file-type icon+tag, 9 colors x 2 sizes), FileUploadArea (drag-drop dashed zone with a Browse File button, real drag/drop + file-input wiring), and FileUploadCard (progress card with uploading/success/error states, progress bar, dismiss and retry actions).
sourceNote: FileFormatIcon's page shape uses RemixIcon's file-2-line glyph (already resembles the folded-corner page in the Figma raster) with a separately drawn colored format tag, keeping the project's RemixIcon-only icon policy instead of importing the raw Figma page/corner vectors. Color mapping (gray/blue/red/orange/yellow/green/purple/teal/pink) maps to the same state tokens as Badge/ColorDots (faded/information/error/warning/away/success/feature/verified/highlighted).
